meta.title: Mateico — Custom laser-engraved mates in Amsterdam
meta.description: Handcrafted personalized mates with laser engraving. Unique design, Argentine identity, made in Amsterdam. Join the waitlist.

hero.title: Your mate, your story
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted personalized mates with laser engraving. Unique design, Argentine identity, made in Amsterdam.
hero.success: You're in! We'll let you know when we launch.

gallery.title: Our designs
gallery.subtitle: Every mate tells a story. Pick yours or create one from scratch.

step1.title: Choose your design
step1.description: Pick one of our designs or send us your personalized idea.

step2.title: We laser-engrave it
step2.description: Each mate is hand-engraved with high-precision laser technology.

step3.title: We deliver it to you
step3.description: Get it at your door in Amsterdam or we ship it wherever you are.

about.title: About us
about.text1: We're Argentines living in Amsterdam who missed drinking mate from a mate that tells our story.
about.text2: Mateico was born from that nostalgia: handcrafted mates with laser engraving that blend Argentine identity with contemporary design. Every piece is unique, just like the person who carries it.
about.text3: From Amsterdam to the world, with River Plate soul.

orderForm.title: Order your custom mate
orderForm.subtitle: Tell us what you have in mind and we'll put together a proposal.
orderForm.name: Your name
orderForm.designPlaceholder: E.g.: I want a mate with the Amsterdam skyline mixed with the Obelisco...
orderForm.success: Order sent! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Custom mates with Argentine soul, made in Amsterdam.
